title: User Signup Success Flow
description: Verify that a new user can successfully sign up using valid credentials and is authenticated with an active session.

steps.description: Navigate to signup page
Enter valid user information (email, password, and required fields)
Submit signup form
Verify signup is successful and user is redirected to authenticated home view
Verify session is active and maintained via Supabase SSR

title: User Signup Failure with Invalid Data
description: Verify that signup fails when user inputs invalid or incomplete data and appropriate error messages are shown.

steps.description: Navigate to signup page
Enter invalid or incomplete signup data (e.g., invalid email, weak password)
Submit signup form
Verify form validation errors are displayed and signup is rejected

title: User Login Success Flow
description: Verify users can log in successfully with valid credentials and that session is properly created and maintained.

steps.description: Navigate to login page
Input valid email and password
Submit login form
Verify user is authenticated and redirected appropriately
Verify session is active via Supabase SSR

title: User Login Failure with Incorrect Credentials
description: Verify login fails when users enter invalid credentials and appropriate error message is shown.

steps.description: Navigate to login page
Enter incorrect email or password
Submit login form
Verify login fails and error message is displayed

title: User Logout Flow
description: Verify that users can logout successfully, session is cleared, and user is redirected appropriately.

steps.description: Login with valid user credentials
Click logout button/menu item
Verify session is cleared
Verify user is redirected to public home or login page

title: Admin Dashboard Access Control - Authorized Admin User
description: Verify that authorized admin users can access the /admin route and all admin dashboard features.

steps.description: Login with valid admin user credentials
Navigate to /admin URL
Verify access is granted to admin dashboard
Verify role based authorization middleware validates admin role

title: Admin Dashboard Access Control - Non-Admin User
description: Verify that non-admin users are blocked from accessing the /admin route and redirected or shown error.

steps.description: Login with valid non-admin user credentials
Navigate to /admin URL
Verify access is denied and user is redirected or presented an access denied message

title: Middleware Enforces Session Validation on Admin Routes
description: Verify middleware correctly checks for user session and denies access if session is missing or expired on /admin.

steps.description: Attempt to navigate to /admin URL without an active session
Verify middleware redirects to login page or displays appropriate error
Login and expire session manually, then access /admin
Verify access is denied due to expired session

title: Product Management on Admin Dashboard
description: Verify that admin users can create, edit, and delete products via the admin dashboard interface.

steps.description: Login as admin and navigate to product management section
Create a new product with valid data
Verify new product appears in product list
Edit existing product details
Verify updated product details are saved and displayed
Delete a product
Verify product is removed from the list

title: Event Management on Admin Dashboard
description: Verify that admin users can create, update, and remove events through the admin dashboard.

steps.description: Login as admin and navigate to event management section
Add a new event with valid details
Verify new event is listed and displayed correctly
Update an event's details
Verify updated event details are saved and shown
Delete an existing event
Verify event is removed from the admin dashboard

title: Session Persistence Across Server and Client Components
description: Verify that user sessions are seamlessly maintained and synchronized between server and client components via Supabase SSR and state management.

steps.description: Login with valid user
Navigate across different pages and reload the browser
Verify session state persists and UI updates accordingly using Zustand and TanStack Query
Verify no unauthorized data leak between client and server components

title: UI Render Consistency and Responsiveness
description: Verify that UI elements in the Global Header, User Menu, and Admin Dashboard render properly across different devices and screen sizes following the Tailwind CSS design system.

steps.description: Open application in various device simulators (mobile, tablet, desktop)
Verify Global Navigation Header is visible and correctly styled
Verify User Menu items display correctly and respond to authentication state changes
Verify Admin Dashboard UI and interactive elements render correctly and consistently

title: No Exposure of Sensitive Environment Variables to Client
description: Verify that no sensitive environment variables or service keys are leaked or accessible on the client side.

steps.description: Perform static code scan and runtime inspection of client bundles
Verify that environment variables with sensitive information are only accessible on server-side code
Confirm that no credentials, keys, or secrets appear in client-exposed code or network requests

title: TypeScript Strict Typing Enforcement
description: Validate that all code modules related to authentication, global header, and admin dashboard adhere to strict TypeScript typing with no use of any type.

steps.description: Run static type checking over all related source files
Verify no usage of any type and no TypeScript compilation errors

title: Role-Based Authorization Middleware Data Integrity
description: Ensure that middleware enforcing RBAC correctly validates user roles at the database and session level without bypass, preventing unauthorized admin access.

steps.description: Login as various users with different roles (admin, user, guest)
Attempt to access /admin endpoints and sensitive admin functions
Verify middleware performs accurate role validation and denies unauthorized access
Verify database level authorization prevents unauthorized data manipulation
